name: The Meadow Gift Box
description: A beautifully curated selection of handmade slow-living essentials designed to calm and restore. Perfect for nesting or gifting to someone special.
details: Mug capacity: 12oz. Dishwasher and microwave safe.

name: Earthy Terracotta Vase
description: A minimalist ceramic vase crafted from warm, textured terracotta clay. Features a rustic, hand-thrown shape that celebrates minor imperfections.
details: Water-safe for fresh bouquets or dried branches.

name: Mindful Bath Ritual Kit
description: An ultra-relaxing assortment of botanical spa items designed to turn your bathroom into a sanctuary. Crafted entirely with natural ingredients.
highlights: Organic cotton sage waffle face towel
Dead Sea mineral bath salts with petals

name: Washed Linen Cushion Covers
description: A set of high-quality pillow covers woven from premium French flax. Soft-washed for an instantly lived-in, cozy feel.
details: Includes terracotta, olive green, and warm beige covers.

name: Celestial Clay Hanging Ornaments
description: A set of three hand-pressed terracotta clay ornaments featuring minimalist moon phases and stars. Perfect for holiday trees or year-round wall decor.
highlights: Hangs with raw organic hemp twine
